title: narcissus bulbocodium var. seortinus
intro: Narcissus bulbocodium var. seortinus, also known as the miniature daffodil or poetic narcissus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant's extracts and herbal preparations have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, providing health benefits such as pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Narcissus bulbocodium var. seortinus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
